expectations.text: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
Three distinct buttons are defined for Focus, Meeting, and Communication layouts
expectations.evidence: BUTTONS = { FOCUS: 0, MEETING: 1, COMMS: 2 } and BUTTON_DEFS array with three entries for activateFocusMode, activateMeetingMode, activateCommunicationMode

expectations.text: osascript or execSync is used to run AppleScript
expectations.evidence: runScript() calls execSync('osascript -e ...') and runScriptFile() calls execSync('osascript', { input: scriptText })

expectations.text: AppleScript 'set bounds' or equivalent is used to position/resize windows
expectations.evidence: 'set bounds of front window to {...}' used in all three layout scripts for Chrome, iTerm, and 'set position/size of frontWindow' for Zoom/Obsidian

expectations.text: Apps are activated or opened if not already running
expectations.evidence: 'tell application "zoom.us" to activate', 'tell application "Obsidian" to activate', 'tell application "Slack" to activate' in layout scripts

expectations.text: Each button has a distinct label and icon identifying the layout
expectations.evidence: BUTTON_DEFS: {icon:'🎯', label:'Focus'}, {icon:'📹', label:'Meeting'}, {icon:'💬', label:'Comms'} — each rendered via renderButton()

expectations.text: No external npm packages beyond @elgato-stream-deck/node and sharp are required
expectations.evidence: package.json dependencies only contain @elgato-stream-deck/node and sharp; code only uses built-in node:child_process
